def generate_signals(df, params):
    import pandas as pd
    import numpy as np
    import ta
    
    window = params['window']
    atr_multiplier = params['atr_multiplier']
    rsi_window = params['rsi_window']
    
    # Calculate support/resistance levels
    df['support'] = df['low'].rolling(window).min()
    df['resistance'] = df['high'].rolling(window).max()
    
    # Calculate ATR for volatility filter
    df['atr'] = ta.volatility.AverageTrueRange(df['high'], df['low'], df['close'], window=14).average_true_range()
    
    # Calculate RSI for confirmation
    df['rsi'] = ta.momentum.RSIIndicator(df['close'], window=rsi_window).rsi()
    
    # Generate signals
    signals = pd.Series(0, index=df.index)
    
    # Long signal: close breaks above resistance with RSI > 50 and volatility filter
    long_condition = (df['close'] > df['resistance']) & \
                     (df['close'] > df['resistance'] + atr_multiplier * df['atr']) & \
                     (df['rsi'] > 50)
    
    # Short signal: close breaks below support with RSI < 50 and volatility filter
    short_condition = (df['close'] < df['support']) & \
                      (df['close'] < df['support'] - atr_multiplier * df['atr']) & \
                      (df['rsi'] < 50)
    
    signals[long_condition] = 1
    signals[short_condition] = -1
    
    return signals.astype(int)
rationale: AUD/USD exhibits strong breakout behavior when price breaches key support/resistance levels with confirmation from RSI and volatility-adjusted thresholds.
